articles.title: Rain brings relief from heatwave conditions - Prokerala
articles.full_text:
New Delhi: People enjoy rain after showers brought respite from the scorching heatwave conditions in the national capital, New Delhi, on Saturday, May 30, 2026.
A person rides a vehicle during rainfall that brought respite from the scorching heatwave conditions in the national capital, New Delhi, on Saturday, May 30, 2026.
A woman enjoys rain after showers brought respite from the scorching heatwave conditions in the national capital, New Delhi, on Saturday, May 30, 2026.
